<var>
$DPS$ = Damage / Firerate
$BOSS$ = {{#expr:Damage * Boss Multiplier round 0}}
$BDPS$ = Boss Damage / Firerate
$CE$ = Total Price / DPS
$BCE$ = Total Price / Boss DPS
$TP$ = $FNC-TOTALPRICE$
$EXP$ = {{#expr:floor(75 * 1.075^(Level - 1))}}
$FNC-SCHEMA$ = N; N; N; N; A; A; A; A; B; B; B; B;
$FNC-BRANCH$ = Top Path Stats; Bottom Path Stats
$FNC-COST$ = 8500; 3000; 7000; 17200; 35000; 55000; 100000; 175000; 40000; 95000; 120000; 250000
$FSE-DETECTION$ = 2; ; ; ; ; 5; ; 4; -1;
$FSE-UPGRADE$ = Combat Tactics; 32nd Spec-Ops; Re-routed Funds; Fortifier; Defensive Maneuvers; Flak Jacket; Hammerhead; Experimental Weaponry; Bigger Guns; Titanium Armor; Thresher
$FSE-UPGRADEICON$ = 123365136014760; 93721065871366; 96118655853436; 111732653007157; 95544278655808; 98941243657730; 106308635701035; 110879981278605; 88574561737643; 126158680785346; 101185222776747
$FSE-CATEGORY$ = Evolved
$DREF$ = <ref name=dps>DPS does not consider rev time.</ref>
$RC$ = $FNC-RECURSION$
</var>
<div class="mobile-tabber"><tabber>
|-|Regular =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="8" |Neutral Stats
|-
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Firerate !! Rev Time !! Range !! DPS$DREF$ !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 9 || 0.15 || 2 || 17.5 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 9 || 0.12 || 2 || 17.5 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 14 || 0.12 || 1.8 || 20 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 28 || 0.12 || 1.8 || 22 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>

<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="10" |Top Path Stats
|-
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Firerate !! Rev Time !! Range !! Fortify Radius !! Fortify Debuff Time Reduction !! DPS$DREF$ !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 65 || 0.15 || 1.2 || 22 || 10 || 25% || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 5 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 120 || 0.15 || 1.2 || 26 || 13 || 25% || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 6 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 150 || 0.12 || 1 || 26 || 13 || 30% || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 7 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 215 || 0.12 || 1 || 26 || 14 || 50% || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>

<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="12" |Bottom Path Stats
|-
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Boss Multiplier !! Boss Damage !! Firerate !! Rev Time !! Range !! DPS$DREF$ !! Boss DPS !! Cost Efficiency !! Boss Cost Efficiency
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 40 || 1.4 || $BOSS$ || 0.1 || 1.8 || 22 || $DPS$ || $BDPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}} || {{Money|$BCE$}}
|-
| 5 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 85 || 1.4 || $BOSS$ || 0.1 || 1.8 || 26 || $DPS$ || $BDPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}} || {{Money|$BCE$}}
|-
| 6 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 135 || 1.4 || $BOSS$ || 0.1 || 1.8 || 28 || $DPS$ || $BDPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}} || {{Money|$BCE$}}
|-
| 7 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 180 || 1.4 || $BOSS$ || 0.09 || 1.6 || 28 || $DPS$ || $BDPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}} || {{Money|$BCE$}}
|}
</div>
<!-- @se-ignore -->
|-|Levels =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="12" |Levels
|-
! Level !! Exp !! Total Exp
|-
| 0 || {{Exp|0}} || {{Exp|0}}
|-
| 1 || {{Exp|$EXP$}} || {{Exp|75}}
|-
| 2 || {{Exp|$EXP$}} || {{Exp|155}}
|-
| 3 || {{Exp|$EXP$}} || {{Exp|241}}
|-
| 4 || {{Exp|$EXP$}} || {{Exp|334}}
|-
| 5 || {{Exp|$EXP$}} || {{Exp|434}}
|-
| 6 || {{Exp|$EXP$}} || {{Exp|541}}
|-
| 7 || {{Exp|$EXP$}} || {{Exp|656}}
|-
| 8 || {{Exp|$EXP$}} || {{Exp|780}}
|-
| 9 || {{Exp|$EXP$}} || {{Exp|913}}
|-
| 10 || {{Exp|$EXP$}} || {{Exp|1,056}}
|-
| 11 || {{Exp|$EXP$}} || {{Exp|1,210}}
|-
| 12 || {{Exp|$EXP$}} || {{Exp|1,376}}
|-
| 13 || {{Exp|$EXP$}} || {{Exp|1,554}}
|-
| 14 || {{Exp|$EXP$}} || {{Exp|1,746}}
|-
| 15 || {{Exp|$EXP$}} || {{Exp|1,952}}
|-
| 16 || {{Exp|$EXP$}} || {{Exp|2,173}}
|-
| 17 || {{Exp|$EXP$}} || {{Exp|2,411}}
|-
| 18 || {{Exp|$EXP$}} || {{Exp|2,667}}
|-
| 19 || {{Exp|$EXP$}} || {{Exp|2,942}}
|-
| 20 || {{Exp|$EXP$}} || {{Exp|3,238}}
|}
</div>
<!-- @/se-ignore -->
</tabber></div>
